channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Multiple bags of garden waste dumped, 22nd June
item.description:
3 Henry road rear garden was cleared today by owner and the rubbish dumped on pavement in black bags

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Henry Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hackney is smelling so bad!, 22nd June
item.description:
Hackney council needs to realise that bin collections should not be done fortnightly during heat waves. You can no longer walk on the streets without covering your nose. Peoples bins are filled with maggots.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Millfields Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The smell is unbearable., 22nd June
item.description:
I am the second house on Millfields Road. People use my bins as there is no public bins in the area. This has caused very well smells in the area. My windows are directly next to the bins. I can’t open my windows in this heat.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Millfields Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two drowned squirrels, 22nd June
item.description:
Two squirrels drowned on our water butt, while we were away. No 32 Weigall Road Our neighbour fished them out because they were bloated and smelly. And put them in a black bin liner in our black bin. What should we do?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Weigall Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This was done on the 19th of June. But some how the day we had seen the man that was doing it the same day this had been broken. And I tried to do the fix my street the day before which is Saturday I don’t think it went through please can this be fixed, 22nd June
item.description:
This location of where the pavement is done it’s cracked and it’s moving not sure how it cracked but it’s dangerous. Please can this be fixed thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheviot Close, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Denmark Hill SE5, front of 56-60. Flypost and tag on cabinet., 22nd June
item.description:
Please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52-54, Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress flytipped, 22nd June
item.description:
Please check and remove. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chorleywood Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of chairs, bottles and rubbish from the church, 22nd June
item.description:
Last night the church put 2 chairs against the wall after their event and people from the chirch was throwing their supermalt bottles and rubbish on the corner of our entrance. This morning the chairs have now been thrown next to our entrance of our property.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abery Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 22nd June
item.description:
As per title

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glengall Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin in tennis courts in Poverest damaged, 22nd June
item.description:
The bin in the tennis courts enclosure in Poverest is damaged. It looks like it’s been hit with a football or similar and had come off its bracket. Coincidentally, when I arrived at 5 pm this evening, there were 4 lads in the courts area with bikes, kicking their footballs over the net on court 1

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lockesley Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two single matresses dumped on West street, 22nd June
item.description:
Dumped matresses outside sub station blocking door access.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lambeth Council Refusing to remove flytip since 27th April, 22nd June
item.description:
Ref: 9575713 reported 27th April ref: 9438560 reported 12th May ref: 9511385 reported 27th May ref: 9537022 reported 31st May ref: 9575713 reported 7th June All ignored by Lambeth, some for nearly 2 whole months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Alexandra Drive, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree roots causing structural damage and lifting driveway surface, 22nd June
item.description:
I am writing to formally request the removal of the overgrown tree at this location. The roots have breached the property line, spreading underneath my driveway and causing active surface damage that requires immediate remediation.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albury Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car driver dumps rubbish from his car, 22nd June
item.description:
This car's driver dumped rubbish out on the street. LV64 GNK grey Nissan car.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Basingdon Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Silver Honda with smashed windows, 22nd June
item.description:
Abandoned Silver Honda with smashed windows possibly stolen, located at end of road just before alley way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wellan Close, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged kerb, 22nd June
item.description:
Kerb has been damaged for a few months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kimmeridge Road, Elmstead, Greater London

item.title: Flytipping, 22nd June
item.description:
Please check and remove. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 296, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Grafitti on the stairwell, 22nd June
item.description:
There is small amount of Grafitti on the stairwell for Flats 43-50 Melford Court .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Melford Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 22nd June
item.description:
Looks like someone dumped the rubbish contents of their car boot in parking space

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gilbert Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drivers ignoring temporary lights. Accident likely., 22nd June
item.description:
A temporary 3 way traffic light has been set up at the bottom of Holmbury Park. Drivers heading away from Bromley are ignoring/jumping the red light due to impatience with traffic queues. As a result drivers who leave Holmbury Park when given a green light end up driving head on towards moving/oncoming traffic. This happened to me. An accident is probably inevitable... Not sure what the solution is but needs changing / some form of traffic enforcement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sundridge Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights
